1958 GMC 9310 Stepside Pickup 3-Speed

International CAN
P Premium
NR No Reserve
A Alumni
This 1958 GMC 1/2-ton Stepside pickup is said to have been previously used at a lumber yard in British Columbia, and it was refurbished approximately five years ago. The truck is powered by a 269ci inline-six paired with a three-speed manual transmission. Additional equipment includes 20" US Mags wheels, Monroe shocks, a heater, and lap belts.
